adr_entry: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation tunes existing flowRibbonField parameters (trailLength, sourceCount, advection step) and adds one new `aTrailProgress` attribute following the established optional attribute pattern in `shaderRegistry.ts`. Shader changes (new varying for trail fade, adjusted fog/depth parameters) extend existing GLSL conventions. All modifications are contained within the flowRibbonField system boundary.
